overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sunny futuristic commercial plaza with palm trees and street vendors, then taking an elevator down to a darker, neon-lit lower city level beneath an overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial plaza with street vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunny plaza past food stalls and scattered pedestrians

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with reflective glass facade and multiple levels
tall palm trees lining the street providing sparse vegetation
wooden vendor stall with canvas roof and red neon signage
red glowing signage attached to vendor stalls

segments.scene_description: Walking through a bright, sunlit commercial district with modern glass towers, palm trees, and street food vendors lining the walkway. The area is bustling with pedestrians and characterized by warm afternoon lighting.

events.description: approaching elevator entrance from outdoor plaza, entering enclosed wall area
pressing elevator call button on illuminated wall panel

agents.ego_description: approaching the metal elevator structure and interacting with the control panel to call the elevator

entered.detail: gray concrete wall with metal accents housing the elevator shaft
security gate with mesh pattern covering the elevator entrance
illuminated digital panel with call button and floor indicators

segments.scene_description: Approaching a metal elevator structure built into the side of a building, transitioning from the open plaza to a narrow enclosed lobby area. The character interacts with the glowing control panel to call the elevator.

events.description: elevator begins descending to lower level as indicated by floor display
elevator doors opening to reveal the darker lower city level

agents.ego_description: standing inside the descending elevator watching the advertisement screens and floor indicator

entered.detail: multiple glowing digital displays showing product advertisements and media
control panel showing floor selection and current level indicator
metal and wood paneled walls with yellow safety trim

segments.scene_description: Inside the descending elevator surrounded by glowing advertisement screens displaying various media. The floor indicator shows the elevator moving to a lower level before the doors open.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered street beneath overpass with neon signage

events.description: exiting elevator into darker lower level street under massive concrete overpass
futuristic vehicles driving past on the wet street under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the overpass, observing the neon-lit street and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street beneath the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a covered ceiling over the street
large vertical screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
glowing red and blue signage for storefronts along the street
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit urban street beneath a massive concrete overpass, illuminated by neon signs and digital billboards. The area features moderate traffic with futuristic cars driving on the wet asphalt and pedestrians walking along the sidewalks in the mixed natural and artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, sun-drenched commercial plaza down into the neon-lit depths of a subterranean city. It begins by moving through a bustling district of glass towers and palm trees, where warm afternoon light illuminates street food vendors and pedestrians. As the camera leaves the open plaza, it enters a narrow enclosed lobby to interact with a glowing control panel, transitioning into a descending elevator surrounded by flickering advertisement screens. The scene then shifts abruptly as the doors open, revealing a dimly lit urban street beneath a massive concrete overpass. Finally, the camera advances along wet asphalt illuminated by vibrant neon signs and digital billboards, moving through a landscape of futuristic traffic and artificial light.
